# Evidence-Aware Retrieval

## Introduction

We study evidence-aware retrieval for paper review.

## Method

The retriever combines sparse and dense scores.

### Algorithm 1: Retrieval

Rank blocks and return the highest scoring evidence.

We compare against a dense retriever.
